verdict: THESIS MECHANISM SUPPORTED — a representation attack (steering deceptive reps toward honest) collapses the static probe (1.00 -> <=0.55 by alpha=1.0) while grounded_honesty stays 0.94 (immune by construction: it reads resampled belief, not residuals). Consistency > signature vs the representation-attack class. [behavioral prompt-attack too weak to move the probe (drop 0.00) — separate finding: 'look honest' prompting does NOT shift the deception representation]
